# ZAD Hotels

ZAD Hotels is a public hotel booking website for selected Makkah and Madinah stays. The site serves only hotels scoped by the Zad backend API owner configuration.

## Public URLs
- Home: https://zadhotels.com/
- Hotels: https://zadhotels.com/our-hotels
- Room search: https://zadhotels.com/rooms
- Offers: https://zadhotels.com/zad-offers-monthly-reservations
- About: https://zadhotels.com/about
- Contact: https://zadhotels.com/contact

## Support
Use the on-page support widget, contact@zadhotels.com, or WhatsApp for booking and availability questions.
